# UBS Hebrew semantic dictionary notice — completed template record

The previously provisional notice is completed by
[the U3-T7 derived-material notice](../UBS-HEBREW-V0.9.2-DERIVED-NOTICE.md).
It records the exact source pair, source pins, modification description,
ShareAlike boundary, TAHOT/usfmtc witnesses, and the current migration-free,
runtime-inert state. Retain this redirecting template for historical planning
links; do not use the former “unapproved/not vendored” wording.

The exact completed pair is `UBSHebrewDic-v0.9.2-en.JSON` and
`UBSHebrewDicLexicalDomains-v0.9.2-en.JSON`, under CC BY-SA 4.0.
